query:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (protocol)
                  id AS "id!",
                  source_id,
                  target_id,
                  protocol,
                  observed_at,
                  hops AS "hops: SqlxJson<Vec<HopJson>>",
                  path_summary AS "path_summary: SqlxJson<PathSummaryJson>"
           FROM route_snapshots
           WHERE source_id   = $1
             AND target_id   = $2
             AND observed_at >= $3
             AND observed_at <= $4
           ORDER BY protocol, observed_at DESC, id DESC
